high_priority_findings.finding: LEVERAGE FINDING (conf=0.80): High leverage 6-10x = -$34.4 total (91 trades, avg -$0.38). Medium 3-5x = +$53.6 total (68 trades, avg +$0.79). Effect persists despite higher WR at high leverage (41%). High leverage amplifies tail losses. Cap at 5x aligns with this data.
